Support

We're here to help you get the most out of Fuel.

Contact Us

For any questions, issues, or feedback, email us at support@fuelapp.ai. We typically respond within 24 hours.

Report a Bug

Found something that isn't working right? Send us a detailed description of the issue, including your device model and iOS version, and we'll investigate promptly.

Account & Data

To request account deletion or data export, email us from the email address associated with your Fuel account. We will process your request within 5 business days.

Frequently Asked Questions

How does Fuel analyze my food?

Fuel uses advanced AI to identify foods from photos and estimate nutritional content. We combine AI analysis with a database of 600+ foods calibrated against USDA data for accurate results.

Is my food data private?

Yes. Food photos are processed by AI for analysis and are not stored on our servers afterward. Your food logs are stored securely and are only accessible to you.

How accurate is the calorie tracking?

Fuel provides AI-estimated nutritional values calibrated against USDA data. While no food tracking app can be 100% precise, our AI aims for the closest possible estimate and provides confidence levels for each analysis.

Can I use Fuel offline?

Fuel includes an on-device food database for basic lookups without an internet connection. However, AI-powered photo analysis and the chat nutritionist require an active internet connection.

How do I cancel my subscription?

You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time through your iPhone's Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

How do I delete my account?

To delete your account and all associated data, email support@fuelapp.ai from the email address linked to your account. We will confirm deletion within 5 business days.

fuel

AI-powered nutrition tracking that actually understands your food.
